top_signals.title: Uruguay’s Offshore Oil Province Could Be Bigger Than Vaca Muerta
top_signals.summary: Companies are gearing up for exploration drilling in deepwater blocks offshore Uruguay in the hope that the South Atlantic margin offshore South America could hold a lot of oil, similar to the recent discoveries offshore Namibia in Africa.   Uruguay, with a limited exploration drilling history of three wells spudded, all dry, has attracted the interest of many international companies that look to find the next billion-barrel oil province. Companies including Shell, Chevron, Eni, APA, QatarEnergy, and Argentina’s YPF have acquired the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: More than 2,700 deaths linked to UK heatwaves
top_signals.summary: For the first time on record temperatures of 35C or higher had been recorded in May, June and July of the same year in UK

top_signals.title: Police suspects Dutch hackers were involved in Odido breach
top_signals.summary: The Dutch National Police (Politie) says it has found "strong indications" that Dutch hackers have been involved in a February breach at the telecommunications provider Odido. [...]
